TranslationContext: This file contains Unit Names for the Deepwood Guardians Faction.

Translations.Comment: Protectors of ancient forest. Used 'Foresta Profonda' to convey timeless, primordial nature of faction.
Basic forest defenders. 'Sentinella' conveys watchful role befitting basic troops.
Tree spirits. Standard Italian adaptation of fantasy term; maintains classic fantasy creature designation.
Swift and graceful warriors. 'Danzatori' conveys both grace and combat prowess of agile forest units.
Forest archers. Direct translation emphasizing their woodland domain and archery mastery.
Elite scouts. 'Esploratori' captures roving, elite scout nature of deep forest hunters.
Forest cavalry. Classic term for mounted warriors riding forest creatures with fantasy flair.
Nature-powered war machine. Full military designation conveys importance befitting powerful unit.
Majestic flying creature. 'Monumental' emphasizes size and grandeur of aerial unit.
Cavalry riding forest stags. Paired term with other cavalry units for consistency across faction.
Living tree creature. Adapted fantasy term to Italian phonetics while maintaining classic nomenclature.
Ancient forest dragon. Classic, straightforward naming befitting the faction's mightiest aerial unit.
Mythological creature. Italian adaptation of gryphon maintains classic fantasy creature designation.
Forest leader. Direct translation emphasizing both noble rank and forest affinity.
Nature magic user. Italian form of fantasy term paired with forest affiliation for consistency.
Ancient tree spirit leader. Builds on 'Treante', emphasizing age and wisdom fitting an elder unit.
